/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/maos_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/maos_server.dir/src/Database.cpp.o -o maos_server  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd -framework CoreFoundation -framework Security /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlicommon.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlienc.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libbrotlidec.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib
